title: GabCraft19's Medieval Spears
description: from now on Minecraft has Spears
body:
# GabCraft19's Medieval Spears  

it requires the mod GabCraft19's Weapons API

## Description:  

GabCraft19's Medieval Spears is a combat-focused mod that introduces a range of spears into Minecraft, adding diversity and depth to your weapon arsenal. These spears are designed to provide players with new tactical options, whether for exploration, defense, or battle.  

While the mod stands strong on its own, it also serves as a stepping stone for future mods in the GabCraft19 series, ensuring compatibility and expanding gameplay possibilities.  

## Features:  

- **Diverse Spears**: Adds various types of spears, each with unique stats and crafted from familiar materials, blending seamlessly into the Minecraft experience.  
- **Balanced Gameplay**: Carefully tuned damage, speed, and reach to offer a new, engaging combat experience without disrupting the game's balance.  
- **Future Compatibility**: Built as part of the GabCraft19 series, this mod will integrate smoothly with upcoming mods, enhancing its utility over time.  

Unleash your inner warrior with these finely tuned spears and elevate your Minecraft adventures.  

**Found a bug or have feedback?** Join my **Discord server** to report issues for free. Your contributions help keep my mods alive and continuously improving. Thank you for your support!
